ocr_findings.description: OCR header line reads '第5章 開発技術' but image page header shows '出る順！過去問＆完全解説' with chapter 6 sidebar marker (第6章 開発技術). OCR inserted wrong chapter number '5' instead of '6' in this running header line.

reviewer_notes: Exam page with 4 questions (問題6-10 to 6-13) covering DevOps, オブジェクト指向, リバースエンジニアリング, and 受入れテスト. All question bodies and ア/イ/ウ/エ choices are accurately captured. Answer line (イ/ア/エ/ア) is complete and correct. The wrong chapter number in the running header is a minor OCR error.
